description: International outlaw motorcycle club formed in Glasgow, Scotland in 1963 by Allan Morrison and Billy Gordon. It is the oldest outlaw biker club in Europe and one of the largest in the UK, with chapters in Scotland, England, Belgium, Spain, and Germany. The club has been linked to organized crime and designated a criminal motorcycle gang by Belgian federal police.

country_links.evidence_quote: The club has chapters in Scotland, England, Belgium, Spain and Germany.
country_links.context: The Blue Angels have chapters in Belgium and have been designated a criminal motorcycle gang by the Federal Police of Belgium.

country_links.evidence_quote: Region served: Europe (19 chapters in Scotland, England, Belgium, Spain and Germany)
